# AI-Me Specification

> Open specification for machine-readable discovery manifests — one-fetch, site-wide discovery for AI agents.

AI-Me defines a JSON document served at `/.well-known/ai-me.json` that provides canonical pages, offerings, pricing model, and primary calls-to-action in a strict, validatable shape.

## Links

- Specification: https://spec.ai-me.dev/spec
- Quick Start: https://spec.ai-me.dev/quickstart
- Generate Your Manifest: https://spec.ai-me.dev/generate
- Examples: https://spec.ai-me.dev/examples
- Validator: https://spec.ai-me.dev/validator
- FAQ: https://spec.ai-me.dev/faq
- GitHub: https://github.com/aselims/ai-me
- Discovery Manifest: https://spec.ai-me.dev/.well-known/ai-me.json
- Full Documentation: https://spec.ai-me.dev/.well-known/llms-full.txt
